mapper.select: SELECT * FROM image WHERE imageType = '상품' AND articleNO = #{productNO} ORDER BY imageNO ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM image WHERE articleNO = #{productNO} AND imageType = '상품' AND imageNO NOT IN ( SELECT imageNO FROM image WHERE articleNO = #{productNO} AND imageType = '상품' ORDER BY imageNO ASC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY imageNO ASC

SELECT p.productNO, p.productName, p.productDescription, p.productPrice, i.imageFilename FROM ( SELECT productNO, productName, productDescription, productPrice, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY productName ORDER BY productOptions) AS rn FROM product ) p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT articleNO, MIN(imageFilename) AS imageFilename FROM image WHERE imageType = '상품' GROUP BY articleNO ) i ON p.productNO = i.articleNO WHERE p.rn = 1 AND p.productName LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT p.productNO, p.productCategory, p.productName, p.productDescription, p.productPrice, p.productQty, p.productUpdated, p.productOptions, (SELECT imageFilename FROM image WHERE articleNO = p.productNO AND imageType = '상품' ORDER BY imageNO ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageFileName FROM product p WHERE p.productNO = #{productNO}
